title: OOL-2
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Droid |type=Corporate |image=[[File:OOL-2_full.png]] |name=OOL-2 |homeworld= |birth= |death= |creator= |manufacturer= |line=[[B-series battle droid/Legends|B-series battle droid]]''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' |model=[[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] |class=[[Battle droid/Legends|Battle droid]] |cost= |length= |width= |height=1.91 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]Based on information applicable to all [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s according to {{DB|droid|battledroid|battle droid}} |mass= |gender= |pronouns= |sensor= |plating= |armament= |equipment=[[E-5 blaster rifle/Legends|E-5 blaster rifle]] |affiliation=[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] }} {{Quote|You will deal with these gundarks, OOL-2. Find them, skin them, and bring their pelts to our Trandoshan friends.''"
"''Yes sir.|Nute Gunray and OOL-2|audio=Yessir.flac|}} '''OOL-2''' was a [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] who served in the [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Trade Federation Droid Army]]. Sometime between [[39 BBY/Legends|39]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]], OOL-2 was deployed to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]], which the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] was trying to [[Alaris Prime colonial war|colonize]].There, OOL-2 found a [[Power core/Legends|power core]] that had been damaged by the moon's [[Gundark/Legends|gundarks]] and later completely destroyed by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. OOL-2 reported the loss of the power core to the Trade Federation's [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|leader]], [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]], who ordered him to find the gundarks he believed were responsible and [[Death/Legends|kill]] them. ==Biography== {{Quote|I have located the malfunctioning power core. Destroyed by gundarks, sir.|OOL-2, reporting to Nute Gunray|audio=PowerCoreFound.flac|}} OOL-2 was a [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] that served in the [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Trade Federation Droid Army]]. Between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the [[Alaris Prime colonial war]] between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]]. OOL-2 was sent to [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]], a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] recently [[Discovery of Alaris Prime|discovered]] by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. The [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] wanted to [[Alaris Prime colonial war|colonize]] the moon, but [[Alaris Prime colonization resolution|consent]] to do so had been given to the Wookiees who had found it by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. Nevertheless, OOL-2 arrived on the moon with a large contingent of the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Army/Legends|army]] sometime before the Wookiees landed on Alaris Prime. [[File:OOL-2_power_core.png|thumb|left|2500px|OOL-2 at the power core's ruins]] While OOL-2 was on Alaris Prime, two Wookiees, [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[Shoran]], landed on the moon and destroyed one of the Trade Federation's [[Power core/Legends|power cores]] that had already suffered heavy damage after being attacked by [[Gundark/Legends|gundarks]], the main predator on Alaris Prime. The Trade Federation noticed the damage to the power core and sent OOL-2 to find it. OOL-2 found its ruins and reported its destruction to the Trade Federation's [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|leader]], [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]], incorrectly informing him that gundarks had destroyed the power core. Gunray ordered OOL-2 to find the gundarks that he believed were responsible, [[Death/Legends|kill]] them, and then sell their pelts to the Trade Federation's [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] allies. The Trade Federation later [[Skirmish at the gundark nest|attacked]] the gundark nest and eliminated the creatures from Alaris Prime but were eventually [[Battle for Alaris Prime|driven off]] the world by the Wookiees. ==Characteristics== As a B1 battle droid, OOL-2 stood at 1.91 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. The droid received orders directly from Nute Gunray. ==Equipment== OOL-2 wielded an [[E-5 blaster rifle/Legends|E-5 blaster rifle]]. ==Behind the scenes== OOL-2 first appeared in the [[2001]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', voiced by [[Michael Gough]]. OOL-2 only appears at the end of the level "Moving and Attacking," the first level in the Wookiee training campaign, wherein he investigates a power core destroyed by the player using Chewbacca and Shoran earlier in the mission. If the player clicks on OOL-2, the droid is only named as a normal Trade Federation [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]], with his name only given in dialogue with Nute Gunray. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of OOL-2|soundcat=Audio files of OOL-2}} *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=OOL-2 }} [[Category:B1-series battle droids]] [[Category:Droids of the Trade Federation]] [[Category:Droids with unspecified gender programming]] [[Category:Droids with unspecified pronouns]]
